name: Creamy Eggnog Fruit Dip
recipeInstructions:
Combine marshmallows and eggnog in a small saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally until the marshmallows are melted. Cover and refrigerate until cold. Stir before serving; spoon into a serving bowl. Sprinkle with nutmeg. Serve with fresh fruit.
Microwave directions:
Combine marshmallows and eggnog in a medium microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes, stirring once halfway through the cooking time until the marshmallows are almost melted and the mixture is hot. Whisk until the marshmallows have completely melted. Continue as directed.
